시편 60:1.content: God, you have rejected us. You have broken us down. You have been angry. Restore us, again.

시편 60:2.content: You have made the land tremble. You have torn it. Mend its fractures, for it quakes.

시편 60:3.content: You have shown your people hard things. You have made us drink the wine that makes us stagger.

시편 60:4.content: You have given a banner to those who fear you, that it may be displayed because of the truth.

시편 60:5.content: So that your beloved may be delivered, save with your right hand, and answer us.

시편 60:6.content: God has spoken from his sanctuary: “I will triumph. I will divide Shechem, and measure out the valley of Succoth.

시편 60:7.content: Gilead is mine, and Manasseh is mine. Ephraim also is the defense of my head. Judah is my scepter.

시편 60:8.content: Moab is my wash basin. I will throw my sandal on Edom. I shout in triumph over Philistia.”

시편 60:9.content: Who will bring me into the strong city? Who has led me to Edom?

시편 60:10.content: Haven’t you, God, rejected us? You don’t go out with our armies, God.

시편 60:11.content: Give us help against the adversary, for the help of man is vain.

시편 60:12.content: Through God we will do valiantly, for it is he who will tread down our adversaries.
